description: ReadMe is a platform for building and hosting API documentation, reference content, and developer hubs. It also provides tooling for syncing docs, exposing docs to AI tools, and collecting developer experience metrics.
summary: ReadMe exposes a REST API at https://api.readme.com/v2, a project MCP server surface, and two CLIs (`rdme` and `@readme/cli`); the REST API and `rdme` use a ReadMe project API key, while MCP and the newer CLI have unclear public auth mechanics in the retrieved docs.
